suggest.weline/module-ai: Enables optional AI theme adapters, agents, and tools.
suggest.weline/module-cdn: Publishes preview cache-bypass rules when CDN integration is installed.
suggest.weline/module-eav: Enables EAV-backed option metadata in Theme query operations.
suggest.weline/module-file-manager: Resolves configured brand media paths through the public media API.
suggest.weline/module-module-router: Preloads the compiled module router cache in persistent workers.
suggest.weline/module-seo: Enables optional SEO head-context integration for theme FAQ facts.
suggest.weline/module-server: Enables WLS shared-state-aware worker warmup integration.
suggest.weline/module-websites: Enables website target types and the AI virtual-theme workbench integration.
